summary_en: Ureru Net Advertising Group to acquire Parrot Beak Co., Ltd. (mobile systems and communications company with ¥1.463B revenue, operating profit positive) toward full subsidiary status via fundamental agreement. Deal structure, valuation, and closing conditions not disclosed in excerpt provided.
title_en: Fundamental Agreement for Full Subsidiary Acquisition of Parrot Beak Co., Ltd. (Mobile Systems and Mobile Communications Company with ¥1.463B Revenue and Operating Profit)
translation_en_brief: Ureru Net Advertising Group Co., Ltd. has executed a fundamental agreement to acquire Parrot Beak Co., Ltd., a mobile systems and mobile communications company, with the aim of making it a full subsidiary. Parrot Beak reported ¥1.463 billion in annual revenue and is currently operating profitably. The disclosure document is supplementary material providing background on the transaction. Specific terms including acquisition price, share count, stake percentage, expected closing date, and transaction conditions are not visible in the excerpt provided.
